programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Cut off from his father's fortune, Koothrappali appoints Sheldon to help him get out of debt; Penny considers joining Leonard at Comic-Con.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-Sits
programme.desc: Rachel feels like her younger sister, Amy, is finally on the verge of making a major change in her attitude; in order to help Amy become a more responsible person, Rachel overrides Ross' strong protests and allows Amy to baby-sit Emma.

programme.desc: When Ross interviews with Charlie's ex-boyfriend (Greg Kinnear) for a prized grant, the doctor makes a shocking stipulation; Chandler lies about watching Joey's bizarre audition tape.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Harris is forced to confront Darlene about her lifestyle; Jackie involves herself in other people's problems to avoid confronting her own; Becky is overwhelmed by the costs of raising a baby, so her family steps in to help.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Desperate for more income, Becky seeks a bartending position at Casita Bonita, causing major concern for Dan due to her struggle with alcoholism; Darlene finally nears a decision between David and Ben; Harris' new friend, Odessa, means new trouble.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent puts a sign with slogans in front of the gas station and coffee shop; Brent and Emma worry about Oscar's memory.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: The Dog River hockey team finds itself at a crossroads; Brent is a great goalie and is being taken for granted by his teammates; when an offer from a rival team comes his way, he has a decision to make.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Hank wants to change methods; Wanda uncovers a shocking truth about founding pioneer woman Jane T. Wright; Oscar tries to sneak into the fair despite being banned.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Brent, Hank and Emma have a viral video contest; Karen and Davis try to GPStag the locals; Lacey asks Wanda to secure her WiFi.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.desc: Taxi passengers win money by answering trivia questions.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Halloween brings nothing but horror for Jackie after she uncovers a shocking secret when trying to reopen the Lunch Box; Mary gets upset when a woman assumes she is adopted; Darlene continues to deal with her complicated love life.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Jackie and Becky pitch their business plan to Darlene in hopes of getting the Lunch Box back, but Darlene's decision leads to hostility; Dan bans Odessa from the house, causing a rift with Harris; Mark makes extensive Thanksgiving plans.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Pager, a Club and a Cranky Bag of Wrinkles
programme.desc: Dr. Linkletter pushes Sheldon to make friends with his fellow students at college; Georgie gets a pager.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Box of Treasure and the Meemaw of Science
programme.desc: Sheldon, Dr. Linkletter and Meemaw team up on a science experiment; Mary is jealous that Pastor Jeff and Brenda are spending time together; Georgie has a new side hustle.

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Mitch's Son and the Unconditional Approval of a Government Agency
programme.desc: When the IRS accuses Sheldon of making a mistake, he'll stop at nothing to prove them wrong; Dale is forced to get a colonoscopy and tries to convince Meemaw to join him.

programme.desc: A chaotic day at Sacred Heart forces the doctors and interns to face burnout, life-changing decisions and their relationships with one another.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: On the way to the Grey Cup, Brent considers his real feelings for Lacey.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent and Lacey try to figure out their relationship; Emma's on the warpath.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent finds out his parents never married; Lacey's mission to help Oscar.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Davis regains sense of smell; Brent realizes how little he knows about his friends.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unassuming people enter a taxi cab as simple passengers taking a normal ride, only to be shocked when they discover that they're contestants. The driver/host, Adam Grove, asks the passengers trivia questions as he takes them to their destination.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.
